title: Letter D Adventure
description: Discover the letter D with dog, duck, and dinosaur
learningObjectives: Identify D-words: dog, duck, dinosaur, donut, door

characters.prompt: Friendly cartoon tutor character, neutral expression, simple 2D style, transparent background
Friendly cartoon tutor character, happy smiling expression, simple 2D style, transparent background
Friendly cartoon tutor character, thinking expression, simple 2D style, transparent background
Friendly cartoon tutor character, encouraging expression, thumbs up, simple 2D style, transparent background
Friendly cartoon tutor character, waving hand, simple 2D style, transparent background

objects.prompt: Cute cartoon brown dog, friendly face, sitting pose, simple 2D style, transparent background
Cute cartoon yellow duck, orange beak, simple 2D style, transparent background
Friendly cartoon green dinosaur, T-Rex or long neck, simple 2D style, transparent background
Colorful cartoon donut with pink frosting and sprinkles, simple 2D style, transparent background
Cartoon wooden door, slightly open, simple 2D style, transparent background

letters.prompt: Cartoon uppercase letter D, purple color, playful 3D-ish style, bold outlines, transparent background
Cartoon lowercase letter d, purple color, playful rounded style, transparent background

backgrounds.prompt: Warm kindergarten classroom interior, soft pastel colors, flat illustration style
Colorful dog park scene with dogs playing, fences, grass, trees, flat cartoon style
Prehistoric landscape with friendly dinosaurs, volcanoes in distance, flat cartoon style

ui.prompt: Green play button, rounded rectangle, white triangle icon, transparent background
Orange next button, rounded rectangle, white arrow, transparent background
Filled yellow star, achievement indicator, transparent background
Horizontal progress bar UI, purple fill, rounded ends, transparent background
Green checkmark, success indicator, transparent background

narration.text: Hey there, letter learner! Ready for D?
This is the letter D. It says duh-duh-duh like dog!
Dinosaur! Big D for big dinosaur! Roar!
Find the D things! Dog, duck, dinosaur, donut, door!
D-lightful work! You know A, B, C, and D now! Next: letter E!

feedback.text: D is for done! Great job!
Almost! Listen for the D sound.
